title: citharexylum fruticosum
intro: Citharexylum fruticosum, also known as the Texas sage, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Citharexylum fruticosum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting respiratory health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. Citharexylum fruticosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
